final:
module top_module(
    input   wire[31:0]  if_pc,
    input   wire[31:0]  if_is,
    input   wire        rst,
    input   wire        clk,
    output  reg[31:0]  id_pc,
    output  reg[31:0]  id_is,

    input   wire        stl_mm,
    input   wire        mmif_ok
);always @ (posedge clk) begin
        if (rst == 1'b1) begin
            id_pc <= 32'h00000000;
            id_is <= 32'h00000000;
        end else if (stl_mm == 1'b0) begin
            id_pc <= if_pc;
            
                id_is <= if_is;
            
            
            
        end else begin

        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      id_pc <= ~if_pc; id_is <= ~if_is;
    end
  end

endmodule
